title: Joenikpsy End Update
description: Adds Baby Ender Dragon, Grown Endermites, a New Biome and a New Structure
body:
<center>
  
![The Joenikpsy End Update Logo.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd1cc52d5e29a6cc6b1891ee139946e259e6620e.png)
The End hasn't been updated for **a whole decade**.

This mod adds a **complete End Update** to Minecraft, featuring:

• **Baby Ender Dragon**

• **Mite Midlands Biome**

• **Mite Manor Structure**

• **Grown Endermites**

• **Boss Endermite**

# Trailer
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/seW9FnvNRa0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### [German YouTube Video About The Mod (click here) ](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GW80X8OkER8&)

# Explanation
After beating the Ender Dragon, you will find a redesigned Dragon Egg.

Collect it, place it anywhere yourself and wait. After 3 minutes, the Baby Ender Dragon will hatch.

It will automatically be tamed by the nearest player while hatching. Right click the Dragon to make him sit.

The Baby Dragon teleports with you through End Gateways.

Feed it with Chorus Fruit to make him lead you to the nearest Mite Manor (the new structure).

If you can't keep up with the dragon, it'll wait for you (if you're not in 30 blocks range anymore).

In the Mite Manor, you will find stairs leading down to tunnels where the Grown Endermites live.

There's a small chance you'll find a small cave in the tunnels. There, the Boss Endermite is protecting rare Enderite loot.

You can find the Enderite Ore in any Mite Midlands biome underground just like other normal ores.
